name: Matt Finders
abstract: Matt Finders (born February 12, 1960) is an American trombonist based in Southern California. A former member of The Tonight Show Band, he has played with various big bands and in major musical productions on Broadway.

about_quotes.speaker: Loren Schoenberg
about_quotes.evidence: So I started to assemble a band that was a mixture of Doug Lawrence and Ken Peplowski and Chuck Wilson and Matt Finders and Tony Kadleck later... And the band on that record was Dick Katz, Howard Alden, Phil Flanigan, Mel Lewis, Bobby Pring, Eddie Bert and Matt Finders
about_quotes.doc_title: Loren Schoenberg interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 14, 2019
